title: phase-state.json
description: Mid-draw resume state written by scripts/merge-create-component-handoff.mjs after each Step 6 slice. Validated on read by mergeOne(); violations exit 18. Hand-rolled validator lives in validatePhaseStateSchema (same file). Keep this file and the validator in sync.

component.description: shadcn component name (e.g. 'checkbox'). Carried forward; not enforced beyond type.

fileKey.description: Figma file key for the draw target.

lastSliceOk.description: Last merged slug (e.g. cc-doc-props) or a multipart sub-slug (e.g. cc-doc-matrix.part2). See merge-create-component-handoff isValidStepSlug; JSON schema is intentionally loose; JS validator enforces shape.

nextSlug.description: Next slice to run, or a multipart sub-slug. Contiguity is validated in JS; relaxed when .part* appears in completedSlugs.

completedSlugs.description: Contiguous prefix of SLUG_ORDER ending at lastSliceOk. Must not contain placeholders.

lastCodeSha256.description: SHA-256 (64 lowercase hex) of the canonical handoff.json after the last merge. Placeholder strings (e.g. 'pending', '...') are rejected — use null if no merge has run yet.
